title: Rebuild Bet of the Day probability model with injury/GTD/freshness handling
summary: Fix Bet of the Day probability model to incorporate injury/GTD/freshness context properly
current_problems: Probability logic is too blunt: model = implied + team_boost is just market price + flat adjustment
No injury context: team bets should factor in injuries but currently don't
No GTD handling: key players GTD should increase uncertainty, not boost confidence
No uncertainty penalty: should penalize edge for stale data, missing support, incomplete slate
required_changes: Rebuild probability model - remove hard floor clamp(model, 0.01, 0.95), build real expected margin logic, add bounded uncertainty penalty
Add injury context - pull injury data from Tank01, factor confirmed OUTs into team strength, apply bounded adjustments
Add GTD handling - key player GTD = uncertainty penalty, do not boost probability
Freshness enforcement - stale source = automatic NO_BET, make this automatic in the pipeline
guardrails: do not use fake precision around injury or role changes
GTD is uncertainty, not directional signal
stale data must result in NO_BET
no hard floor clamp that hides real model output
acceptance_criteria: code diff showing probability model rebuild
one full-slate run with honest probability logic
visible thresholds for: candidate threshold, no-bet threshold, blocked conditions

reject_if: stale data still produces candidates without penalty
probability model still uses blunt flat adjustment
